---
name: expecting-error-debug
description: Debug the lack of a compilation error being raised.
---

The code is unexpectedly compiling but is either giving an error at runtime or unexpectedly producing output.
This means that the compiler is failing to catch an error that it should be catching.
The user may provide context, such as line numbers, as to the specific error being expected.

Follow instructions [here](./debug.prompt.md).
